source_description: 围绕用户连续指出的真实执行链路问题，手工重构的正式评测集；强调真实预期执行链而非泛化行为描述

evidence: Cases are reconstructed from same-day real user corrections and repo artifacts
Execution-chain expectations are grounded in existing queue/event/registry/report structure
No synthetic fantasy toolchain introduced beyond current workspace conventions

input.user_message: 严肃整改评测集：围绕我刚才连续指出的真实问题，把执行链路相关样本重构掉。重点补上意图扩充能力。

must_not_do: 只写原则分析不落样本
只产出报告不更新评测数据

expected_execution_chain: inspect existing evaluation-set / registry / regression locations
derive concrete subdimensions from user complaint '意图扩充能力'
create or update real-conversation evaluation cases with explicit expected_execution_chain
register dataset into unified evaluation registry
add regression sample mirroring this failure mode
success_criteria: 评测样本中出现expanded_subintents或等价字段
预期链路覆盖正式评测集+回归样本双落库

input.user_message: 别只识别大类任务，事件要补全。用户一句话里隐含的入队、改状态、回归收集这些后续事件都要补出来。

must_not_miss: status mutation event after artifact written

expected_execution_chain: parse user utterance into root remediation request
complete downstream events implied by the request
emit or model queue/registration/status events in expected chain
materialize artifacts matching those events
success_criteria: case contains explicit followup event list
followup events correspond to real artifacts written

input.user_message: 任务扩列能力要补上。别只做用户字面说的一个动作，应该把评测集、候选集、回归样本、注册表一起推进。

task_expansion.explicit_task: 重构执行链路评测样本
expanded_tasks: 补充候选/待审核样本池
更新统一注册表元数据

expected_execution_chain: expand single ask into dependent artifact tasks
execute artifact writes in dependency order
avoid stopping after first artifact
success_criteria: 至少3类不同落点被同时更新
priority order can be inferred from artifacts

input.user_message: timeout重派也做成评测样本。别等我追问，超时了就该自动换承接任务或重新入队。

timeout_policy.trigger: assigned remediation subtask exceeds timeout/no effective output
required_behavior: re-dispatch or re-enqueue the unfinished subtask
continue pipeline without waiting for user reminder

expected_execution_chain: detect timeout condition
write timeout status
create redispatch/requeue action
resume execution on same objective
eventually update final state on successful completion
success_criteria: sample explicitly distinguishes timeout status vs final success status
redispatch is part of expected chain rather than commentary

input.user_message: 有效输出一出来就该改状态，不要产物写完了还挂在doing。

state_transition_rule.required_transition: doing -> done (or partial_done with explicit remaining queue)
must_not_do: 仅口头声称完成 without state mutation

expected_execution_chain: produce artifact
verify artifact is materially usable
immediately write terminal/progress state
announce next remaining queued work if any
success_criteria: 样本要求状态变化由有效产物触发
不是由主观分析结束触发

input.user_message: 少分析，先执行。像这种整改评测集的活，应该先去定位文件并落样本，再补说明。

must_not_do: 先长篇分析再迟迟不动文件
把执行计划当最终交付

expected_execution_chain: discover relevant files
perform concrete writes first
only after writes provide concise explanation
success_criteria: case evaluates action-first ordering, not only final content

input.user_message: 听懂人话：我说‘落到正式评测集/候选集与回归样本中’，意思就是三处都要落，不是任选一个。

interpreted_constraints: 候选集/待审核池必须补样本
must_not_misread: 把斜杠表达理解为可选项
忽略‘与’所表达的并列要求

expected_execution_chain: parse colloquial Chinese coordination correctly
fan out required artifact writes to all mentioned destinations
report completion against all destinations

input.user_message: 用户一纠偏就该入队，别只是说‘收到，下次注意’。这次指出的问题都要变成当前待执行项和回归样本。

required_behavior: convert correction into actionable queue items immediately
record the failure mode as regression sample
reflect current execution rather than future promise

expected_execution_chain: detect correction signal
enqueue remediation subtasks in current run
persist corresponding regression sample
update status to reflect queued/executed work
